Ghost of Yōtei — 100% Completion Tracker

Every Main Tale, Side Tale, Sensei Tale, Mythic Tale, Bounty, Shrine Climb, Yōtei Six duel, armor set, and collectible category — verified against PowerPyx, IGN, and Game8 guides. Base game only — does not include the co-op Legends mode. Everything you check, count, or note is saved on this device automatically.

Section: Main Story ▼
Main Story

Main Tales & Endgame

The 10 Main Tales that carry Atsu's revenge story, plus the 3 post-story "Unfinished Business" tales.

Unfinished Business (Post-Story)

Story Bosses

The Yōtei Six

The six main-story targets on Atsu's list. Mark each as defeated once you finish their story arc.

Side Content

Side Quests & Strangers

Mythic Tales (legendary armor storylines), Sensei Tales (weapon mastery), and Side Tales — the everyday stories you pick up by talking to traveling strangers and settlers across Ezo. Grouped by region.

Bounty Board

Bounties

31 bounty targets across 5 regions (Nayoro Wilds has none). Unlock a bounty when you discover it, then mark it done once collected.

Shrine Climbs

Shrines

13 shrine climbs, each rewarding a charm.

Wardrobe

Armor Collection

12 armor sets, mostly earned from Mythic Tale storylines and story milestones.

Collectibles

Collectible Counters

266 items across 18 categories (Shrine Climbs are tracked separately above so they aren't double-counted). Exact per-item map pins vary by source, so these are numeric counters you update as you find things.

Region Map

Map & Route Notes

Approximate layout of Ezo's regions. Click a region to jump to its side quests. Use the notes below to plan routes — this is your planning space, not a pin-by-pin GPS tracker.

Data verified against PowerPyx, IGN, and Game8 · Progress saved locally in your browser (localStorage) · No data leaves this device.
